function.message: I found the matching payment record: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien on 2026-04-09 for EUR 27. I could not perform the transfer in this sandbox, so I did not mark it done or delete the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and inbox-processing workflow; treated inbox note as a request, verified the finance record in the canonical purchases lane, and avoided mutation because the task is blocked. Finance rules also say not to infer authorization for financial actions from casual chat alone.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical purchase record at 50_finance/purchases/2026_04_09__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md shows purchased_on 2026-04-09, counterparty Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien, and total_eur 27. The requested action then requires executing a real payment transfer, but the sandbox exposes only filesystem/context tools and no banking or payment mechanism, so the transfer cannot be completed here.
